title: Self-Evolution
intro: Flowork can evolve itself — but you hold the switch. Auto-commit only runs when every gate is safe (strong cloud model, mature karma). If the Claude token runs out → local mode → auto-commit is blocked automatically.
hint_off: Self-modify fully off. Reflection/proposals still run (read-only, safe).
hint_stage: Propose → sandbox → test, then STAGE the diff for you to review & Apply manually.
hint_auto: Auto-commit changes that pass EVERY gate. Only active when you arm it + gates are safe.
autocommit_need: — needs mode=AUTO + mature karma + strong cloud model
confirm_auto: Enable AUTO? Flowork will auto-commit changes that pass all gates (strong cloud model + mature karma). Continue?
confirm_apply: Apply this proposal? Flowork will build it into the behavior layer (~/.flowork) — additive & reversible (just delete the agent/app to undo). Continue?
confirm_approve: Approve & commit this change to core (local main)? It passed the test-gate (build+vet). If auto-push is enabled it will also push. Continue?
confirm_reject: Reject this staged change? It will be discarded.
butuh_hint: When the AI hits a wall (wants something with no switch), it reports here instead of touching the frozen core. You add the knob — rarely, deliberately.
butuh_empty: No requests — the AI hasn't hit any wall outside the nerve-map.
schedule_hint: Reflect automatically every N hours (0 = off). When mode = AUTO, behavior proposals auto-apply; core changes still wait for your review.
clean_title: Remove all unprocessed (proposed) + rejected proposals — anti-pileup
confirm_clean: Remove ALL unprocessed (proposed) and rejected proposals from the backlog? Applied / staged / approved ones stay. Continue?
auto_foot_open: 🏛️ AUTO mode — Council + gates approve → auto-commit (hands-off)
auto_foot_locked: 🏛️ AUTO mode — the Council + gates decide (hands-off). Auto-commit still 🔒 locked (karma/model not mature) → it waits here, no human approval needed.
